== Ultimate Body ==
This organ is obtained by infusing embryonic stem cells with the essence of ultimate bionic parts. It gives transplant recipients a massive leap in performance.

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Ultimate Body
|Rarity=red
|ID Number=72
|Initial HP=110
|HP Increase=30
|Initial ATK=15
|ATK Increase=3
|Initial DEF=15
|DEF Increase=3
|Initial RUSH=11
|RUSH Increase=3
|Effect 1=Earth DMG +###
|Initial Effect Value 1=3
|Effect Value Increase 1=3
|Effect 2=Earth RES +###
|Initial Effect Value 2=1
|Effect Value Increase 2=1
|Effect 3=Against main species, DMG REDUC +###%
|Initial Effect Value 3=0.2
|Effect Value Increase 3=0.2
|Effect 4=Against main species, CRIT DMG REDUC +###%
|Initial Effect Value 4=0.2
|Effect Value Increase 4=0.2
|}}

==Source==
Unlock Bionic Part Extraction in ART [[Shells]]

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Red Organs]]
[[Category:Shells]]
